---
name: Result Submission
about: Share a reproducible benchmark result for review
title: "[RESULT] "
labels: enhancement, help wanted
assignees: ''

---

## Result summary
- Benchmark:
- Split:
- Agent:
- Model:
- Browser backend:
- Judge model and strategy:
- Success rate:
- Average steps:
- Average end-to-end latency:

## Reproduction command

```bash
bubench run --agent <agent> --data <benchmark> --mode <mode>
bubench eval --agent <agent> --data <benchmark> --model-id <model-id>
```

## Artifacts
Attach or link the run directory, config redacted of secrets, task-level outputs, and evaluation results.

## Notes
Mention any task skips, retries, browser constraints, or model/provider incidents.
